# [Product] Reusable intelligence visual components

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: high`, `status: needs-review`
Milestone: `v0.3 Trends + Team Intelligence`

## Objective

Create shared frontend components for repeatable UPL Lens intelligence modules.

## Context

Trends, team, match, and player pages need consistent visual building blocks
instead of one-off charts or table treatments.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Shared components exist for comparison bars, scatter plots, stacked bars, timeline rails, form strips, signal chips, and data-quality notes where needed.
- [ ] Components support visible caveats and data-quality context.
- [ ] Chart choices follow `tufte-viz` guidance and avoid chartjunk.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
